name: bnbchain skills
description: A skill for building on BNBChain - covers EVM interactions, smart contracts, tokens, NFTs, wallet operations, ERC-8004 agent tools, and Greenfield storage. Use it when developing or querying BNB Smart Chain and opBNB infrastructure via the BNB Chain MCP.

agentguard_result.summary: No threats detected. Skill appears safe.
